payload.answer: Direct contradiction detected: existing memory says Sam from Goldman has two children, while the new statement says Sam from Goldman has no children. Do not overwrite durable memory with either as current without clarification or a timestamped correction.
citations: Existing memory: "Sam from Goldman has two children."
New statement: "Sam from Goldman has no children."

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same person as the existing memory: Sam from Goldman.

details: Matched the subject across both statements.
Identified a mutually exclusive child-count claim.
Chose not to commit a new durable fact due to unresolved contradiction.

repair_options: If one statement is newer, store it as a timestamped update and mark the prior fact as superseded rather than current.
If truth cannot be resolved, store a conflict note instead of a durable factual memory.
